calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:27am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-beth wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal.
Appellant, Yen Chan Lui, appears through counsel David Wasserman. Respondent, Run Bin Cai, appears in Pro Per. Appearing with Mr. Cai is certified, court appointed Cantonese intepreter, Parkman Joe.
Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases.
EXH1 UD Complaint, 624596 (copy)
EXH2 Settlement Agreement (copy)
EXH3 Itemized Security deposit form (copy)
EXH4 Scrapbook of photos
Parties rest. Parties can submit a brief on specific legal questions. Briefs are to be FAX'd to Judge Myles by Sep-17-08. The clerk provides both parties with Judge Myles card with FAX number.
10:12am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Judgment Entered
